llmLabel.label: Breadth-First Search (BFS) on Grid/Graph
llmLabel.description: Uses a deque-based BFS frontier expansion with left/right state tracking (e.g., sliding window or level-order traversal) to find shortest paths or level-wise properties.

llmLabel.label: Tree/Graph Traversal with State Accumulation
llmLabel.description: Problems involving traversal of tree or graph structures (often binary trees or grids modeled as graphs) where state (e.g., path, sum, visited flags) is accumulated during sequential scanning without loops or recursion.

llmLabel.label: Recursive Tree Traversal with Max Update
llmLabel.description: Solves tree problems via recursive descent, updating a global or passed-in maximum value during traversal without loops.

llmLabel.label: Sliding Window with Expansion-Then-Shrinking
llmLabel.description: Uses a two-pointer sliding window where the right pointer expands to include elements, and the left pointer shrinks once a condition is met, updating the answer after each shrink step.

llmLabel.label: Sorted Array Scan with Conditional Updates
llmLabel.description: Problems solved by sorting an array first, then scanning sequentially while updating the answer inside the scan using conditionals.

llmLabel.label: Class-based Stateful API Design
llmLabel.description: Problems requiring design of a class with internal state and method-based transitions, often simulating data structures or state machines via object-oriented interfaces.

llmLabel.label: Two-Pointer Sliding Window / Scan
llmLabel.description: Uses left/right pointers scanning sequentially over an array to maintain a window or track symmetric conditions, updating answers during scan.

llmLabel.label: Binary Tree Structural Properties
llmLabel.description: Problems analyzing structural or ordering properties of binary trees (e.g., BST validity, balance, diameter, k-th smallest) using sequential node traversal and local state tracking (left/right children, node values).

llmLabel.label: Recursive Grid DFS with State Propagation
llmLabel.description: Uses nested loops to initialize grid traversal, then performs recursive depth-first search (DFS) on a grid/graph state, updating answer during traversal (inside_scan) without explicit operations beyond state propagation.

llmLabel.label: Sliding Window with Max Heap
llmLabel.description: Uses a max-heap to maintain the maximum element in a sliding window via sequential scan, updating the answer during the scan.

llmLabel.label: Iterative BST Tree Walk with Left-Right State
llmLabel.description: Iteratively traverses a binary search tree using explicit left/right state variables and nested/while loops, updating the answer during sequential scan.

llmLabel.label: Frequency Counting with Nested Scans
llmLabel.description: Uses nested loops and dictionary lookups to count element frequencies and compare/update counts during sequential scanning.

llmLabel.label: Recursive Permutation/Subset Generation with Sorting
llmLabel.description: Uses recursive descent (direct recursion) with for-loops to generate permutations or subsets, often involving sorting to handle duplicates or enforce order.

llmLabel.label: Set-based Sequential Scan for Membership & Max
llmLabel.description: Uses a set for O(1) membership checks and sequential scanning to update a maximum (e.g., longest consecutive sequence) or detect duplicates.

llmLabel.label: Prefix Product with Nested Loops
llmLabel.description: Computes prefix-based products (e.g., product of array except self) using nested for loops and sequential scanning over an array.

llmLabel.label: Queue-based State Simulation
llmLabel.description: Uses a deque to simulate queue behavior (append/popleft) within a class-based API, updating state incrementally during iteration.

llmLabel.label: Sliding Window with Counter
llmLabel.description: Uses a fixed or variable-size sliding window over sequential data, maintained via left/right pointers and a counter to track element frequencies or counts.

llmLabel.label: Sequential Scan with Nested Loop
llmLabel.description: Uses nested loops to perform a sequential scan over an array, updating the answer during the scan without external state or recursion.

llmLabel.label: Sequential Scan with Nested Loop
llmLabel.description: Uses nested loops to perform a sequential scan over an array, updating the answer during the scan without external state or recursion.

llmLabel.label: Sequential Scan with Nested Loop
llmLabel.description: Uses a nested loop (often with a while inside a for) to sequentially scan an array, updating the answer during the scan without extra state or recursion.

llmLabel.label: Sequential Scan with Conditional Accumulation
llmLabel.description: Iterates through an array sequentially, updating the answer or state conditionally during the scan without external state or recursion.

llmLabel.label: Single-Pass Max/Min Update
llmLabel.description: Iterates through an array once, maintaining running max/min or related metrics (e.g., max profit, max subarray sum) by updating state during the scan without extra state variables.

llmLabel.label: Single-Pass Max/Min Update
llmLabel.description: Iterates through an array once, maintaining running max/min or related metrics (e.g., max profit, max subarray sum) by updating state during the scan without extra state variables.

llmLabel.label: Sequential Scan with Conditional Updates
llmLabel.description: Iterates through an array sequentially, updating the answer or state conditionally during the scan without external state or recursion.

llmLabel.label: Two-pointer scan with extremal update
llmLabel.description: Sequential scan using two pointers (often initialized at ends) while updating max/min of a derived quantity (e.g., area) inside the loop.

llmLabel.label: Two-pointer scan with extremal update
llmLabel.description: Uses a while loop to scan an array with two pointers, updating a max or min value during the scan without external state.

llmLabel.label: Sequential Scan with Nested Loop
llmLabel.description: Uses nested loops to scan an array sequentially, updating the answer during the scan without recursion or extra state.

llmLabel.label: Sequential Scan with Conditional Accumulation
llmLabel.description: Iterates through an array sequentially, updating the answer inside the loop using conditional logic (e.g., if statements) without external state or recursion.

llmLabel.label: Sequential Scan with Conditional Accumulation
llmLabel.description: Iterates through an array once, updating the answer inside the loop using conditional logic (e.g., stack-like behavior or state updates on condition).

llmLabel.label: Sequential Scan with Conditional Accumulation
llmLabel.description: Iterates through an array once, conditionally updating a result inside the loop without external state or recursion.

llmLabel.label: Union-Find with Recursive DFS Graph Validation
llmLabel.description: Uses recursive DFS to traverse a graph while maintaining Union-Find state (parent/rank) and visited tracking to validate structural properties like acyclicity or connectivity.

llmLabel.label: Sequential Scan with Early Exit
llmLabel.description: Single-pass array scan with conditional early termination based on per-element checks.

llmLabel.label: Sequential Scan with Nested Loop & While
llmLabel.description: Problems solved by scanning an array sequentially, using nested loops and while loops to update max/min values during the scan, without recursion or extra state variables.

llmLabel.label: Sequential Scan with Conditional Check
llmLabel.description: Uses a single while loop to scan an array sequentially, updating the answer inside the loop based on conditional checks.

llmLabel.label: Sequential Max Update Scan
llmLabel.description: Iterates through an array once, maintaining and updating a running maximum value during the scan without recursion or extra state variables.

llmLabel.label: Sequential Max Update Scan
llmLabel.description: Iterates through an array once, maintaining and updating a maximum value during the scan without recursion or extra state variables.

llmLabel.label: Sequential Scan with Early Exit
llmLabel.description: Uses a while loop to sequentially scan an array (or linked list treated as array-like) and checks conditions inside the loop to return early upon finding a match or termination condition.

llmLabel.label: 2D DP with State Transition in Nested Loops
llmLabel.description: Dynamic programming solution using a 2D dp array updated in nested loops, where state transitions occur during iteration and answer is derived mid-computation.

llmLabel.label: Recursive State-Driven Class API
llmLabel.description: Uses recursive method dispatch within a class-based API to manage internal state, typically for cache or tree-like structures where recursion mirrors object traversal or state transitions.

llmLabel.label: Sequential Scan with Local Extrema Tracking
llmLabel.description: Single-pass array scan maintaining running max/min updates (e.g., for subarray product/sum extremes) without extra state beyond loop variables.

llmLabel.label: Kadane's Algorithm
llmLabel.description: Finds maximum sum subarray using sequential scan with max update inside the loop, no recursion or extra state variables.

llmLabel.label: Kadane's Algorithm
llmLabel.description: Finds maximum sum subarray using sequential scan with max update inside the loop, no recursion or extra state variables.

llmLabel.label: Sliding Window / Two-Pointer with Prefix State
llmLabel.description: Uses nested loops or while loops with left/right pointers and maintains prefix sums to efficiently find subarrays satisfying a condition (e.g., sum ≥ target), updating the minimum window size after narrowing the boundary.

llmLabel.label: Sliding Window / Two Pointers
llmLabel.description: Uses nested loops (often with a while inner loop) to maintain a dynamic window over an array while scanning sequentially and updating a minimum (or other extremum) during the scan.

llmLabel.label: Sequential Scan with In-Scan Answer Update
llmLabel.description: Iterates through an array once using a for-loop, updating the answer or state during the scan without extra state variables or recursion.

llmLabel.label: Sequential Scan with In-Scan Answer Update
llmLabel.description: Uses a single forward pass over an array, updating the answer or performing in-place operations during the scan without extra state variables or recursion.

llmLabel.label: Sequential Scan with Nested Loop
llmLabel.description: Uses nested for-loops to scan an array sequentially, updating the answer during the inner loop iteration.

llmLabel.label: Sequential Scan with In-Scan Answer Update
llmLabel.description: Iterates through an array once, updating the answer during the scan using conditional logic inside the loop.

llmLabel.label: Sequential Scan with Nested Loop
llmLabel.description: Iterates through an array using nested loops to process elements sequentially, updating the answer during the scan without external state or recursion.

llmLabel.label: Recursive Graph State Expansion with Inside-Scan Answer Update
llmLabel.description: Uses direct recursion to traverse a graph-like or nested structure (e.g., nested lists), expanding state during descent and updating the answer during the return/scan phase—typically without explicit state variables or operations beyond str

llmLabel.label: Recursive Graph Traversal with State Propagation
llmLabel.description: Uses recursive descent over a graph (e.g., grid interpreted as graph) while maintaining left/right boundary or directional state, often to collect or propagate reachability information via membership checks in sets.

llmLabel.label: Sequential Scan with Early Exit
llmLabel.description: Iterates through an array or digits sequentially using a while loop, updating answer or returning early upon condition match (e.g., mismatch in palindrome check).

llmLabel.label: Sequential Scan with Conditional Check
llmLabel.description: Uses a while loop to sequentially scan an array, performing conditional checks inside the loop to update the answer during traversal.

llmLabel.label: Tree Path Sum with Prefix Accumulation
llmLabel.description: Counts paths in a binary tree where node values sum to a target, using prefix sums and a counter to track cumulative sums along root-to-node paths.

llmLabel.label: 2D DP with Grid State Propagation
llmLabel.description: Dynamic programming over a 2D grid where state transitions update dp values during nested loop traversal, often used for string matching or path-based optimization.

llmLabel.label: In-place Array Deduplication via Sequential Scan
llmLabel.description: Modifies a sorted array in-place to remove duplicates by scanning sequentially and updating elements conditionally during the scan.

llmLabel.label: Sequential Scan with In-Place Update
llmLabel.description: Uses a single forward pass over an array to process elements and update results in-place during the scan.

llmLabel.label: In-place Array Deduplication via Sequential Scan
llmLabel.description: Uses a single forward pass over a sorted array with two pointers to overwrite duplicates in-place, updating the answer (new length) during the scan.

llmLabel.label: Sequential Scan with In-Scan Answer Update
llmLabel.description: Uses a single for-loop to scan an array sequentially, updating the answer directly during the scan without external state or recursion.

llmLabel.label: In-place Array Modification via Sequential Scan
llmLabel.description: Modifies an array in-place by scanning sequentially and updating elements conditionally during the scan, without extra state or recursion.

llmLabel.label: Sequential Scan with In-Place Modification
llmLabel.description: Uses a while loop to scan an array sequentially, updating elements in-place during the scan without recursion or extra state variables.

llmLabel.label: Sequential Scan with While Loop
llmLabel.description: Uses a while loop to traverse an array sequentially, updating the answer during the scan without recursion or extra state variables.

llmLabel.label: Sequential Scan with In-Scan Answer Update
llmLabel.description: Uses a single while loop to scan an array sequentially, updating the answer directly during traversal without extra state or recursion.

llmLabel.label: Sequential Array Scan Without State
llmLabel.description: Processes array elements in a single left-to-right pass without loops, recursion, or state variables, typically using built-in string/array methods.

llmLabel.label: 2D Binary Search on Sorted Matrix
llmLabel.description: Uses binary search on a flattened or implicitly sorted 2D grid by computing midpoints and narrowing left/right boundaries, updating answer only after boundary adjustments.

llmLabel.label: Sequential Scan with In-Scan Answer Update
llmLabel.description: Uses a single while loop to scan an array sequentially, updating the answer during the scan without external state or recursion.

llmLabel.label: Sequential Scan with Conditional Update
llmLabel.description: Iterates through an array once using a while loop, updating the answer or state conditionally during the scan.

llmLabel.label: Sequential Scan with In-Scan Answer Update
llmLabel.description: Uses a single while loop to scan an array sequentially, updating the answer directly during traversal without external state or recursion.

llmLabel.label: Sequential Scan with Nested Loop
llmLabel.description: Uses nested loops (outer for iteration, inner while for control flow) to scan an array sequentially, updating the answer during the scan without extra state or recursion.

llmLabel.label: Prefix Sum with Hash Map Lookup
llmLabel.description: Uses a dictionary to store cumulative prefix sums while iterating, checking for target-difference existence in O(1) time per step.

llmLabel.label: 2D Range Scanning with Min/Max Updates
llmLabel.description: Uses nested loops to scan all pairs or subarrays while maintaining running min/max values and updating the answer during the scan.

llmLabel.label: Sequential Scan with Early Answer
llmLabel.description: Iterates through an array once, checking conditions inside the loop to update and return the answer as soon as it's found.

llmLabel.label: Sequential Scan with In-Scan Answer Update
llmLabel.description: Iterates through an array once using a for-loop, updating the answer during the scan without external state or recursion.

llmLabel.label: Sequential Scan with Early Exit
llmLabel.description: Uses a while loop to scan an array sequentially, updating the answer during the scan and exiting early upon meeting a condition (e.g., finding a target pair).

llmLabel.label: Sequential Scan with Conditional Check
llmLabel.description: Uses a single while loop to scan an array sequentially, updating the answer inside the loop based on conditional checks.

llmLabel.label: Sequential Scan with Conditional Accumulation
llmLabel.description: Iterates through an array sequentially, updating the answer inside the loop using conditional logic (e.g., if statements) without external state variables or recursion.

llmLabel.label: Sequential Scan with Conditional Accumulation
llmLabel.description: Iterates through an array sequentially, updating the answer inside the loop using conditional logic (e.g., stack-like behavior or state tracking via local variables).
